sections.paragraph:
pl. מַעֲרָכֹות f.-

(1) disposing, ranging in order. נֵרֹות הַמַּעֲרָכָה lamps ranged in order (of the holy candlestick), Exo 39:37 specially-

(2) a pile of wood upon the altar, Jud. 6:26 (compare the verb, Gen 22:9); of the shew-bread, Levit. 24:6 .

(3) a battle set in array, 1Sa 4:16 17:22 , 48 1Sa 17:48.
